options.name: --output
options.description: Specifies the output directory.

options.name: --base-name
options.description: Specifies the base name of the output files.

options.name: --nullable
options.description: Represents the default state of nullable analysis in this compilation. [default: Annotations]

options.name: --checked
options.description: Indicates whether to check for overflow and underflow.

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Indicates whether to generate assembly.

options.name: --generate-artifacts
options.description: Instruct the compiler how to generate artifacts.

options.name: --security-analysis
options.description: Whether to perform security analysis on the compiled contract

options.name: --generate-interface
options.description: Generate interface file for contracts with the Contract attribute

options.name: --generate-plugin
options.description: Generate a Neo N3 plugin for interacting with the compiled contract

options.name: --generate-webgui
options.description: Generate an interactive web GUI for the compiled contract

options.name: --deploy-webgui
options.description: Deploy the generated WebGUI to R3E hosting service

options.name: --webgui-service-url
options.description: URL of the R3E WebGUI hosting service [default: https://api.r3e-gui.com]

options.name: --contract-address
options.description: The deployed contract address for WebGUI deployment

options.name: --network
options.description: The network where the contract is deployed [default: testnet]

options.name: --deployer-address
options.description: The address of the contract deployer

options.name: --optimize
options.description: Optimization level. e.g. --optimize=All

options.name: --no-inline
options.description: Instruct the compiler not to insert inline code.

options.name: --address-version
options.description: Indicates the address version used by the compiler. [default: 53]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the debug level.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: PATHS
arguments.description: The path of the solution file, project file, project directory or source files.
